feat: CLI session mirroring via hooks + auto-generated secure token

Major architecture change — ALL Claude Code CLI sessions now appear
on mobile with full interaction (output, tool approval, message injection).

- Hook API: POST /api/hooks/event — routes SessionStart, PreToolUse,
  PostToolUse, Stop, Notification. PreToolUse/Stop are long-polling
  (wait for mobile response, 5-min timeout, graceful fallback).
- CliSessionTracker: manages CLI session state, pending approvals,
  message injection via Stop hook's systemMessage.
- companion-hook.sh: universal bash hook script, reads token from
  ~/.claude-companion-token, fails gracefully if server is down.
- Auto-token: server generates 32-char hex token on first run, saves
  to ~/.claude-companion-token (0600 perms). No more hardcoded PIN.
- SessionManager merges SDK + CLI sessions in listSessions().
- Mobile shows CLI badge, purple "waiting for input" state, hides
  abort button for CLI sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: Add parentheses around JSX conditionals in tenant/landlord modals

The React JSX parser requires parentheses around JSX expressions when used
as the right operand of the && operator. This fixes the "Expression expected"
error that occurred during build.

Changes:
- Wrapped tenant modal JSX in parentheses: {showTenantModal && selectedUnit && (...)}
- Wrapped landlord modal JSX in parentheses: {showLandlordModal && selectedUnit && (...)}

This enables proper parsing of conditional JSX rendering without syntax errors.

commit.message:
Add unified TCP+HTTP connection layer via EngineDebugger custom message captures

- lib/gd-repl-bridge.js: Register EngineDebugger.register_message_capture("repl", ...) when TCP debugger is active, exposing eval/tree/node/perf/set/call/watch/globals/groups/logs/pause/reload through the existing TCP connection. HTTP server on 6009 kept as fallback.
- lib/debugger-client.js: Add full REPL API (eval, tree, node, perf, set, call, globals, groups, logs, pause, reload) returning Promises via correlation-ID request/response over TCP. Pending map with 10s timeout and disconnect cleanup.
- lib/connection.js: New unified Connection class with Connection.auto() that tries TCP 6007 first, falls back to HTTP 6009. Same API surface regardless of transport. Auto-reconnects every 1s for 30s on disconnect.
- lib/cli-debugger.js: Add 'attach' command that auto-detects running Godot via Connection.auto() and starts REPL.
- bin/cli.js: Add --repl flag to 'launch' command that waits up to 10s for TCP connection then starts REPL.
- lib/index.js: Export Connection.
- demo.js: Add section 9/9 validating unified API surface (Connection.auto, 11 API methods on both Connection and GodotDebuggerClient, GDScript TCP capture patterns).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: structured JSON logging — dual output to file and console (7.6) (#212)

When log_file is set in config, logs are written to both stderr (console
format, CLI-flag-driven level) and the file (JSON format, config-driven
level). Old log files are cleaned based on log_retention_days.

New internal/logfile package handles file creation, parent dir creation,
append mode, and retention-based cleanup. multiHandler in root.go fans
out log records to multiple slog.Handler instances with independent
level filtering (OR semantics for Enabled, per-handler filtering for
Handle). PersistentPostRunE closes the log file on exit.

commit.message:
CardPulse v2: redesign with credits/debits model, TrueLayer auto-import, onboarding

Major redesign based on 30-question design session:

Data model:
- Replace statements (spent/paid/interest) with monthly records (debits/credits/interest/closingBalance)
- Remove fullNumber and address fields from cards
- Add card source (truelayer/manual) and tlAccountId
- Add onboarded flag to users for first-login wizard
- Interest auto-derived from balance deltas, APR fallback for forecasting

Dashboard:
- Hero total balance with live indicator
- Subtitle chips: last month interest + estimated min payment
- Minimal card tiles with issuer color accent dots, tap to navigate
- Pull-to-refresh for TrueLayer data

Cards page:
- Combined settings + monthly history per card
- Inline debit/credit entry for manual cards (amount + toggle)
- DD options now include "full balance"
- Issuer color accents for visual differentiation

Settings:
- Add Card wizard: connected (pick from TrueLayer) or manual
- Remove addresses and notifications sections
- Keep TrueLayer connect/disconnect, appearance, currency, utilization threshold

New features:
- Onboarding wizard: welcome → name/currency → connect bank or add card → done

commit.message:
fix: resolver backend unhealthy en EasyPanel

Dockerfiles (backend + worker):
- Usar node_modules/.bin/prisma generate (binario raíz, siempre disponible en pnpm)
- Eliminar copias redundantes de per-package node_modules en runner
- --no-frozen-lockfile para que pnpm descargue binarios nativos linux-musl correctos

entrypoint.sh:
- Añadir --skip-generate (cliente ya generado en build) y --accept-data-loss
- Logging más claro

compose.yml:
- start_period: 60s en backend healthcheck → espera a que prisma db push termine
- interval: 15s retries: 5 → más tolerante al arranque inicial
- FRONTEND_URL al backend (necesario para CORS correcto)
- OLLAMA_URL y OLLAMA_MODEL al worker (faltaban)
- Todos los env vars opcionales listados explícitamente
- Ruta socket.io añadida a Traefik router del backend
- NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL corregido (sin /api — el cliente lo añade)

index.ts: restaurar import dotenv/config (necesario para dev local)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(output): expand ~ and $VAR in output paths (#38)

* fix(output): expand ~ and $VAR in output paths

Path() does not expand tilde or shell variables, so paths like
~/langlearn-audio or $HOME/audio created literal directories instead
of resolving to the user's home. Add expand_path() helper using
expandvars + expanduser and apply it to all path entry points in
output.py and server.py.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Widen expand_path to accept str | os.PathLike[str]

environments. Use a controlled MY_BASE env var instead.

no deleteMany calls can fail on missing tables.

commit.message:
Restructure into Awilix DI packs, add docstore/google tools, full code review fixes

- Introduce Awilix container (container.ts) with ToolPack pattern and auto-discovery
- Reorganize tools into subdirectories: plpgsql/, docstore/, google/
- Create 3 packs: plpgsql (11 pg_* tools), docstore (4 fs_* tools), google (3 gmail_* tools)
- Rename all tools with domain prefix: pg_*, fs_*, gmail_*
- Add Google OAuth2 auth service with token persistence
- Add docstore tools: fs_scan, fs_sync, fs_peek, fs_open
- Fix transaction safety in fs_scan (try/catch with ROLLBACK)
- Fix regex injection from table names in function.ts/table.ts
- Fix google.options() global state mutation (use per-instance auth)
- Fix EXPLAIN ANALYZE side effects (wrap in ROLLBACK transaction)
- Fix Windows command injection in fs_open (use execFileSync)
- Fix double file hashing in fs_scan (hashCache)
- Add LMNAV completeness: field to all 18 tools
- Add error triplet format (problem/where/fix_hint) to all error paths
- Add _extra param to all handler signatures for MCP cancellation support
- Validate docstore pack dependency on withClient at registration time
- Remove dead callTool code, deduplicate DEFAULT_EXCLUDE constant
- Move pino-pretty to dependencies, @types/express to devDependencies
- Update CLAUDE.md to reflect new architecture

commit.message:
Redesign invitation acceptance for decentralized flow

Replace the shared-filesystem invitation acceptance with a two-step
decentralized flow: acceptor clones the team repo from inviter's S3,
adds themselves as member, pushes to their own cloud, then sends an
acceptance response back. Inviter completes by calling
complete_invitation_acceptance.

- Add S3Remote (CodSyncRemote subclass) with boto3 for direct S3 access
- Update clone_from_remote to follow multi-link chains
- Add inviter_bucket to invitation tokens
- Replace accept_invitation + _mark_invitation_accepted with
  accept_invitation (acceptor-side) + complete_invitation_acceptance
  (inviter-side)
- Update tests to use separate root dirs and MinIO
